Description: The stunning capital city of Portugal, known for its historic neighborhoods, iconic yellow trams, and delicious custard tart pastries (Pastéis de Belém).
The federal capital of Brazil, famous for its unique modern architecture designed by Oscar Niemeyer and its airplane-shaped urban plan.
The City of Light, world-renowned for its art, gastronomy, culture, and iconic landmarks like the Eiffel Tower and the Louvre Museum.
A bustling metropolis blending futuristic technology with traditional temples, neon-lit streets, and world-class cuisine.
The capital of the United States, home to iconic monuments, world-class museums, and the centers of the three branches of the federal government.
Australia's capital city, known for its planned layout, vast open spaces, and national cultural institutions.
The vibrant capital of Egypt, situated on the Nile River and famous for the nearby Great Pyramids of Giza and the Sphinx.
